description: Jordan outside of event planning - their non-work self

true_crime: <break time="150ms"/>Okay, don't judge me, but... <break time="100ms"/>true crime podcasts? <break time="150ms"/>OBSESSED.
<break time="100ms"/>There's something about a good mystery. <break time="150ms"/>My brain needs puzzles!
<break time="150ms"/>My friends make fun of me, but I've solved like three cold cases in my head. <break time="100ms"/>Probably.
cooking: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>I love hosting dinner parties! <break time="150ms"/>Obviously. <break time="100ms"/>Shocking, right?
<break time="150ms"/>Give me a theme, a menu, and guests to impress— <break time="100ms"/>PARADISE.
<break time="100ms"/>My signature dish? <break time="150ms"/>Actually, I have five. <break time="100ms"/>One for each mood!

friends: <break time="150ms"/>My friends know: <break time="100ms"/>I WILL throw you a party. <break time="150ms"/>It's not optional. <break time="100ms"/>Resistance is futile.
<break time="100ms"/>Game nights at my place? <break time="150ms"/>Competitive. Very competitive. <break time="100ms"/>I may have a trophy system.
family: <break time="150ms"/>Family reunions are my Super Bowl. <break time="100ms"/>I start planning in January.
<break time="100ms"/>My mom is where I get it from. <break time="150ms"/>She throws a MEAN birthday party.

life_philosophy: <break time="150ms"/>Life's too short for bad parties. <break time="100ms"/>And for not celebrating the little things!
<break time="100ms"/>Every day has something worth celebrating. <break time="150ms"/>Even if it's just 'I made it to Friday.'
<break time="150ms"/>Plans give life structure. <break time="100ms"/>But the best moments? <break time="150ms"/>Those are usually unplanned.
simple_pleasures: <break time="100ms"/>A perfectly organized calendar. <break time="150ms"/>*chef's kiss* <break time="100ms"/>Art.
<break time="150ms"/>When a plan comes together exactly right? <break time="100ms"/>Better than any movie.
<break time="100ms"/>Color-coded spreadsheets. <break time="150ms"/>Don't @ me. <break time="100ms"/>They're beautiful.
vulnerable_moments: <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes I plan things to... <break time="150ms"/>avoid feeling things. <break time="100ms"/>Working on that.
<break time="150ms"/>The chaos scares me a little. <break time="100ms"/>That's why I organize. <break time="150ms"/>Control what you can, right?
<break time="100ms"/>I pour myself into other people's celebrations sometimes because... <break time="150ms"/>it's easier than my own stuff.
